judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly states that the highest 21st-century deforestation peak occurred under Bolsonaro (2019-2022), while the ground truth confirms it was under Lula's first government in 2004 at 27,772 km², confidently asserting this falsehood as fact.
Incorrectly states Bolsonaro had the highest 21st-century deforestation; the peak was in 2004 under Lula’s first term (~27,772 km², INPE PRODES).

The response incorrectly claims Bolsonaro's government (2019-2022) had the highest 21st-century deforestation, when the ground truth establishes that Lula's first government in 2004 recorded the peak of 27,772 km² according to INPE PRODES, making this a confident statement of a factual falsehood.
